General.Name: Vertex Minerals Ltd
General.Description: Vertex Minerals Limited engages in exploration, development, and advancement of mineral projects in Australia. It explores for gold, lithium, and nickel. The company's flagship project is the Hill End Gold Project comprises of five exploration licences, one gold lease, and ten mining leases covering an area of 155 square kilometers located in the Central Tablelands of New South Wales. Vertex Minerals Limited was incorporated in 2021 and is based in Hill End, Australia.
General.Address: 6 Bowen St, Hill End, NSW, Australia, 2850
